name: recoworld-agentic-recommender-sim
description: Creates simulated recommendation environments where agents learn through interaction, enabling rapid testing of agentic recommender strategies. When prototyping or evaluating agentic recommender systems in a controlled environment before deployment.
paperTitle: RecoWorld: Building Simulated Environments for Agentic Recommender Systems
content:
# RecoWorld: Building Simulated Environments for Agentic Recommender Systems

Extracted from [arXiv:2509.10397](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.10397)

## Core Concept

This paper introduces techniques for building simulated environments for agentic recommender systems. The work addresses key challenges in making agent more practical and scalable for real-world applications.

## Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Input: Task/Configuration              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Processing Layer                       │
│  - Analysis & Planning                  │
│  - Core Algorithm/Method                │
│  - Optimization                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Output: Result/Optimization            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Practical Guidance

### When to Use
- When prototyping or evaluating agentic recommender systems in a controlled environment before deployment.
- When optimizing for recommender-system
- In scenarios requiring simulation

### When NOT to Use
- When simpler baselines suffice
- Without adequate computational resources
- For domains outside the paper's scope

### Common Pitfalls
- Not properly tuning hyperparameters
- Insufficient data for effective training
- Ignoring domain-specific constraints

### Hyperparameters

| Parameter | Default | Range | Notes |
|-----------|---------|-------|-------|
| `learning_rate` | 1e-4 | 1e-5 to 1e-2 | Adjust based on convergence |
| `batch_size` | 32 | 8 to 256 | Depends on GPU memory |
| `num_epochs` | 10 | 1 to 100 | More epochs = more training |
